name: @kedge-agentic/tool-caller-proxy-server
description: Per-session bundled MCP server that proxies tool calls through the ccaas ToolCallerProxy. The Claude Code subprocess sees this binary as a regular stdio MCP server, but tools/call requests are routed over loopback HTTP back to ccaas-core where they're sanitized + audited + dispatched to the registered solution toolkit. See docs/design-tool-caller-proxy.md.
